# Global ownership — maintainer team reviews all PRs
> All     -   @aiacta-org/maintainers

# Spec documents require spec team approval
> /docs/proposals/        @aiacta-org/spec-team

> /shared/schemas/            @aiacta-org/spec-team

# Security-critical code requires security review
> /packages/vwp-gateway/                          @aiacta-org/security-team

> /packages/ai-citation-sdk/src/*/signature*      @aiacta-org/security-team
